'''''Lendros''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] on which [[Golov Nakhym]] attempted to escape the [[Hurrim Base]] during the combined assault by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces and [[Dunari]]'s [[Longshot (Dreadnaught-class)|''Longshot'']]. The [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was disabled and Nakhym was captured by a [[Storm Unit (team)|Storm Unit]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1999-05-03 -->[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
